name: A Siren's Call VR: Death Comes At Night
short_description: After years of his wife being missing. Elliot in a last ditch effort goes to her old family home to get answers.
detailed_description:
Elliot Esker.
A man of tragedy. Lost and alone after the death of his girlfriend in a horrible crash, the story follows Elliot Esker on his own after his wife's body was never found.
Elliot is a mess and only pulls himself together when he gets a strange phone call from his wife's phone. Convinced his wife is alive, Elliot set out to her old family home only to be greeted by a dark secret.

In this direct horror requal you'll take charge as Elliot Esker fighting off weird mold like zombies on your way to finding out the truth. Death and carnage await.

A Siren's Call VR Death Comes At Night is a thrilling horror that begs to be explored.

It is an early access title and not a finished product. Frequent updates will be applied.



I plan to gradually raise the price as I ship new content and features.
